title: Nithin Raj suicide: Accused teacher Dr. MK Ram moves Kerala High Court for anticipatory bail
description: Dr. M Kodanda Ram, a dental college professor accused in connection with the death of Dalit student Nithin Raj, has approached the Kerala High Court seeking anticipatory bail after a sessions court in Thalassery rejected his plea [Dr M Kodanda Ram v State of Kerala & anr].First-year BDS student Nithin Raj is believed to have died by suicide after facing caste-based harassment from the faculty at Kannur Dental College. Raj was found critically injured after allegedly jumping from a building n
